title: Session 19 — Downtime
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Downtime — Judy's ritual worked and a follow-up dropped the bombshell that Brolin and Eira share the same mother; Mr. Spells secretly armed Felson; the only firm plan is G's riot at the main gate.**

# What happened
- **[[pc-varen|Varen]]**: library spellbooks + the **chained book** radiating necromancy.
- **Mr. Spells' office** (business card → unmarked building → cloaked escort): business talk, inventory questions; he and [[pc-felson|Felson]] discussed working together, he **secretly gifted Felson a weapon** and told him to come back with a truly grand **wish** in mind.
- [[pc-eddy|Eddy]] + [[pc-brolin|Brolin]] questioned [[filbert]] about missing money; Felson + [[cumb]] got intel on Filbert's house from a working orphan.
- **Varen + [[eira-cavernborn|Eira]] performed Judy's ritual — it worked.** Follow-up ritual revealed the bombshell: **Brolin and Eira share the same mother.** Eira admitted she wants to **eviscerate [[root-darkpass|Root]] Darkpass.**
- [[soni|Soni]] gave a **large diamond** (revivify). [[giuseppe|G]] arrived; the only firm plan: **G stages a protest/riot at the main gate as the distraction.**

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] Judy's ritual — performed, it worked; the follow-up revealed **Brolin and Eira share the same mother**.
- Felson's secret weapon from Mr. Spells — return with a truly grand **wish** in mind.
- The **chained book** radiating necromancy.
- Eira wants to **eviscerate Root Darkpass**.

# Threads
[[eira-cavernborn]] · [[root-darkpass]] · [[giuseppe]] · [[filbert]] · [[soni]]
